query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `accounting_document_workflow` (
	`id` bigint AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`document_id` bigint NOT NULL,
	`status` enum('requested','uploaded','reviewed','completed','rejected') NOT NULL,
	`changed_by` bigint NOT NULL,
	`changed_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`comment` text,
	`notification_sent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	CONSTRAINT `accounting_document_workflow_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `accounting_documents` (
	`id` bigint AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`category` enum('monthly_report','tax_invoice','receipt','journal_entry','other') NOT NULL,
	`year` int,
	`month` int,
	`file_key` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
	`file_url` varchar(1000) NOT NULL,
	`file_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`file_size` bigint,
	`mime_type` varchar(100),
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`uploaded_by` bigint NOT NULL,
	`uploaded_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `accounting_documents_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `accounting_high_amount_transactions` (
	`id` bigint AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`summary_id` bigint NOT NULL,
	`daily_close_id` bigint NOT NULL,
	`transaction_date` date NOT NULL,
	`transaction_type` enum('deposit','withdrawal') NOT NULL,
	`amount` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`counterparty` varchar(255),
	`created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `accounting_high_amount_transactions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `accounting_monthly_report` (
	`id` bigint AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`summary_id` bigint NOT NULL,
	`file_key` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
	`file_url` varchar(1000) NOT NULL,
	`file_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`file_size` bigint,
	`generated_by` bigint NOT NULL,
	`generated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`version` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
	CONSTRAINT `accounting_monthly_report_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `accounting_monthly_summary` (
	`id` bigint AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`year` int NOT NULL,
	`month` int NOT NULL,
	`total_deposit` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
	`total_withdrawal` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
	`net_cash_flow` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
	`total_days` int NOT NULL,
	`closed_days` int NOT NULL,
	`missing_days` text,
	`high_amount_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`high_amount_threshold` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1000000',
	`status` enum('draft','confirmed','locked') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
	`confirmed_at` timestamp,
	`confirmed_by` bigint,
	`locked_at` timestamp,
	`locked_by` bigint,
	`notes` text,
	`created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `accounting_monthly_summary_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
